query:
SELECT
                    source_id     AS "source_id!: String",
                    relative_path AS "relative_path!: String",
                    size          AS "size!: i64",
                    status        AS "status!: String",
                    drive_file_id AS "drive_file_id: String"
                FROM file_state
                WHERE source_id = ?1
                  AND instr(substr(relative_path, ?2 + 1), '/') = 0
                ORDER BY relative_path ASC
                LIMIT ?3
